wizard.title: Create workspace
wizard.generateTeamDesc: The CEO analyzes the source and proposes an initial team of agents. Requires a selected source.

entry.title: Choose a workspace
entry.subtitle: Open an existing local workspace or start a new one.
entry.footer: Your data stays saved locally on this machine.
entry.deleteBody: This will permanently delete "{name}" and all data related to it.
entry.deleteWarning: Agents, conversations, issues, sources, embeddings, knowledge base data, and internal Orkestral clones will be removed. External local folders you selected will not be deleted.

stepOrchestrator.blurb: This is the workspace's main agent — it coordinates the others.

stepSource.blurb: Link a GitHub repository, Azure Repos repository, or local folder — or skip for now.
stepSource.optionalNotePrefix: A source is optional. You can add one later from the sidebar. Click
stepSource.azureConnectHelp: Connect your Microsoft/Azure DevOps account to list available organizations, projects, and repositories.

folderPicker.scanFound: Found git repositories inside this folder. Pick which ones to add — the folder itself is also added as a local folder.
folderPicker.scanning: Looking for git repositories in the folder…
folderPicker.existingRepoHint: This folder is already a git repository with a remote. You can point to the existing repo (no re-cloning) or add it as a plain local folder.

addSource.title: Add source
addSource.subtitle: Link GitHub, Azure Repos, or a local folder to the workspace.
addSource.azureConnectHelp: Connect your Microsoft/Azure DevOps account to list available organizations, projects, and repositories.
addSource.alreadyLocalSource: This repository is already a local folder: “{label}”. Connect it to see PRs without duplicating the source.
addSource.addToTreeHint: Clones the repo and shows it in the tree. Uncheck to connect only for PRs (no clone).
addSource.analyzeTitle: Analyze source and reassess the team
addSource.analyzeDescription: Scans the repository for the KB and asks the CEO for an incremental agent proposal if this source reveals a new area, such as frontend, backend, or infra.

newProject.title: New project
newProject.subtitle: Connect a local repository or point to GitHub.
newProject.folderHint: Optional — you can add it later.
newProject.descriptionHint: Optional — short context for the agent.
newProject.descriptionPlaceholder: e.g. Task management SaaS in React + FastAPI

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Repositories connected to the workspace.
projects.emptyDescription: Connect a local folder or a GitHub repository so the agents have context.

org.title: Org
org.description: Hierarchy between agents (set in each Settings → Reports to)
org.loadError: Couldn't load the org chart. Try again.

sourceDetail.configDescription: How this source appears and behaves inside the workspace.
sourceDetail.labelHint: Short text shown in the sidebar and in lists.
sourceDetail.roleHint: Source type — used to group PRs in multi-repo analyses (back+front).
sourceDetail.actionsDescription: Operations that affect this source in the workspace.
sourceDetail.setPrimaryDescription: The primary is the workspace's featured source and the one used by default in operations that don't specify another.
sourceDetail.removeDescription: Unlinks this source from the workspace. Local files are not deleted — you can add it again whenever you want.
sourceDetail.confirmRemove: Remove "{label}" from the workspace? Files will not be deleted.

analyzeButton.noPathTitle: Source has no local path yet — wait for the clone
analyzeButton.analyzeTitle: Creates an analysis issue for the CEO
analyzeButton.analyzingTitle: This source is already being analyzed
